|desc=Mallow first encountered an {{p|Oranguru}} when she ran away from home after it saved her when she was injured during a fall. Oranguru later rescued {{TP|Mallow|Steenee}} from {{TRT}}. When [[Abe]] found her, he recognized Oranguru as the one who he befriended in his youth.}}

|desc=Grandpa Forest (Japanese: '''{{tt|森|もり}}のおじいちゃん''' ''Grandpa Forest'') is a {{p|Drampa}} that Mallow and {{an|Lana}} met when they were young. Years later, they met Drampa again after hearing about [[Harper and Sarah]]'s encounter with it.}}
